title: senecio serra var. admirabilis
intro: Senecio serra var. admirabilis, also known as the Woolly Groundsel, is a variety of the Serra Groundsel plant, which belongs to the daisy family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which make it useful in treating wounds and skin issues. The Woolly Groundsel has been reported to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating digestive issues, and serving as an expectorant to relieve respiratory problems. Traditionally, the plant is used to make herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to treat a range of ailments and promote overall health and well-being.
